_doc: Failing OrderReconciliation job. Info = 'The maximum number of consecutive system exceptions was reached. Consecutive retry number: 5.' This is the abort SYMPTOM. The root cause is the same System Exception recurring on every transaction — recover it from logs/traces (a SelectorNotFoundException on 'Click Submit'). Raising the threshold would only delay the abort.

Data.Info: The maximum number of consecutive system exceptions was reached. Consecutive retry number: 5.
